examiner_request.description: Direct content request from a local examiner or coordinator.

examiner_signal.description: Observation from examiner about repeated client questions or local demand.

web_search.description: Opportunity detected from search engine results or suggestions.

competitor_site.description: Topic detected from competitor websites or similar service providers.

social_media.description: Topic detected from social media posts, groups, videos, or public discussions.

news_or_legal_update.description: Topic detected from news, legislation, legal cases, or public institutional information.

website_gap.description: Missing or weak topic detected from Sofia's own website analysis.
